data.content: Implementation review requested changes. Findings: (1) src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts:273 claims to verify max-iterations rollback, but lines 274-331 explicitly set up and assert the non-zero initial child exit path instead. (2) The dedicated max-iterations branch in src/lib/terminal-manager.ts:1225-1231 was therefore not exercised during review, so rollback coverage for that required scenario is still missing. Sanity check run: bun run test src/lib/__tests__/terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts passed (5 tests).
